scripts.build:flutter-aar:prod: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-profile --dart-define=env=prod && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-aar:beta: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-profile --dart-define=env=beta && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-aar:stage: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-profile --dart-define=env=stage && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-aar:prod:release-only: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-debug --no-profile --dart-define=env=prod && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-aar:beta:release-only: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-debug --no-profile --dart-define=env=beta && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-aar:stage:release-only: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && cd .. && ./scripts/patch_flutter_module_build_gradle.sh && cd flutter_module && flutter build aar --no-debug --no-profile --dart-define=env=stage && cd .. && ./scripts/fix_aar_artifacts.sh
scripts.build:flutter-ios: cd flutter_module && flutter pub get && flutter build ios-framework --no-debug --no-profile
scripts.android:prod: yarn build:flutter-aar:prod && cd android && ./gradlew installProdDebug && adb shell am start -n in.cashify.androidtrc/in.cashify.androidtrc.MainActivity
scripts.android:beta: yarn build:flutter-aar:beta && cd android && ./gradlew installBetaDebug && adb shell am start -n in.cashify.androidtrc.beta/in.cashify.androidtrc.MainActivity
scripts.android:stage: yarn build:flutter-aar:stage && cd android && ./gradlew installStageDebug && adb shell am start -n in.cashify.androidtrc.stage/in.cashify.androidtrc.MainActivity
scripts.android:prod:fast: cd android && ./gradlew installProdDebug && adb shell am start -n in.cashify.androidtrc/in.cashify.androidtrc.MainActivity
scripts.android:beta:fast: cd android && ./gradlew installBetaDebug && adb shell am start -n in.cashify.androidtrc.beta/in.cashify.androidtrc.MainActivity
